channel.title: Frontity on Plex 404 error
channel.description:
Greetings to all.
I'm fairly new to Frontity but I cant seem to run the frontity project smoothly on my VPS Plesk server.
I followed the guide (https://community.frontity.org/t/deploy-frontity-with-plesk-node-js-extension/555) and got it working correctly.
The problem is that the console is returning a 404 error as seen in the following image:
![Screenshot 2022-07-30 at 12.25.11 AM|690x66](upload://sEyP392ato7m11iP5kCLEfeIp2B.png)
My app.js is:
``` var frontity = require("./server").default; var http = require("http"); var server = https.createServer(frontity); server.listen(process.env.PORT); ```
Any help would be appreciated.
Thanks in advance!

item.title: Frontity on Plex 404 error
item.dc:creator: Anayia
item.description:
Greetings to all.

I’m fairly new to Frontity but I cant seem to run the frontity project smoothly on my VPS Plesk server.

I followed the guide (Deploy Frontity with Plesk Node.js extension) and got it working correctly.

The problem is that the console is returning a 404 error as seen in the following image:

My app.js is:

var frontity = require("./server").default;
var http = require("http");
var server = https.createServer(frontity);
server.listen(process.env.PORT);

Any help would be appreciated.

Thanks in advance!

Read full topic
